channel.title: Server Management on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Server Management on simeononsecurity

item.title: Proxmox VE 8 to 9 Upgrade Guide: In-Place Upgrade with Automated Script
item.description: Complete guide to upgrading Proxmox VE 8 (Debian Bookworm) to Proxmox VE 9 (Debian Trixie). Covers prerequisites, step-by-step manual upgrade, the pve8to9-upgrade.sh automation script, breaking changes, and known issues.

item.title: Mastering Windows Server Security: Hardening for Robust Protection
item.category: "Technology" , "IT Security" , "Server Management" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Protection" , "Data Integrity" , "IT Infrastructure" , "Best Practices" , "Server Hardening" , "Windows Server"
item.description: Learn effective Windows Server security strategies, from hardening basics to advanced techniques, safeguarding your infrastructure with confidence.
